title: Ensure maximum session duration is no longer than 10 hours

input_row.title: Ensure maximum session duration is no longer than 10 hours
input_row.description: When creating a fleet for AppStream 2.0 configure the Maximum session duration in minutes to be no greater than 600.
input_row.rationale: Having a session duration lasting longer than 10 hours should not be necessary and if running for any malicious reasons provides a greater time for usage than should be allowed.
input_row.audit: Perform the following steps to view the Fleet settings in AppStream From the Console 1. Log in to the AppStream 2.0 console at https://console.aws.amazon.com/appstream2 2. In the left pane click on Fleets. 3. Select the link for the fleet name you wish to view. 4. On the Fleet configuration section confirm that Maximum session duration is set to 600 minutes or less. If Maximum session duration is set to anything greater than 600 minutes refer to the remediation below.
input_row.remediation: Perform the following steps to edit the Fleet settings in AppStream From the Console 1. Log in to the AppStream 2.0 console at https://console.aws.amazon.com/appstream2 2. In the left pane click on Fleets. 3. Select the link for the fleet name you wish to edit. 4. Click Actions, Stop 5. Scroll to the Fleet configuration section and click Edit 6. Change the Maximum session duration is set to 600 minutes or less and click Save Changes 7. Click Actions, Start

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**PROGRAM NAME:** aws_appstream2_fleet_maximum_session_duration_configured

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:**
- Use the boto3 method `describe_fleets()` from the AppStream 2.0 service to retrieve information about the fleets.
- The relevant AWS CLI command is `aws appstream describe-fleets`.
- The specific property to validate is the `MaxSessionDurationInMinutes` of each fleet.
- Configuration settings to validate:
  - Ensure that `MaxSessionDurationInMinutes` is set to 600 minutes or less.
- Pass/Fail criteria:
  - Pass: If `MaxSessionDurationInMinutes` is less than or equal to 600.
  - Fail: If `MaxSessionDurationInMinutes` is greater than 600.
- Example: "Use boto3 `describe_fleets()` to verify that `MaxSessionDurationInMinutes` is 600 or less for all fleets."
